sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import './App.css'; const CEOLPRegistrationForm = () => { const [currentSection, setCurrentSection] = useState('eligibility'); const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ // Eligibility address: '', city: '', zip: '', yearsResident: '', // Contact email: '', phone: '', // End-of-life choice primaryDisposition: '', alternativeDisposition: '', // Designated representative repName: '', repPhone: '', repEmail: '', repAddress: '', // Vital records - required fullName: '', dateOfBirth: '', ssn: '', sex: '', // Vital records - optional placeOfBirth: '', usForces: '', maritalStatus: '', spouseName: '', motherName: '', fatherName: '', occupation: '', industry: '', education: '', hispanicOrigin: '', race: '', electronicImplant: '', implantDetails: '', contagiousDiseases: [], // Health practitioner/caregiver hpName: '', hpGroup: '', hpContact: '', medicalPoaContact: '', caregiverName: '', caregiverContact: '', familyContact1Name: '', familyContact1Info: '', familyContact2Name: '', familyContact2Info: '', // Initial statements understandNotAdvanceDirective: false, understandDiscussWithFamily: false, understandVitalRecordsConfidential: false, // Submitted submitted: false, }); const [eligibilityStatus, setEligibilityStatus] = useState(null); const sections = [ { id: 'eligibility', label: 'Eligibility' }, { id: 'contact', label: 'Contact' }, { id: 'disposition', label: 'End-of-Life Wishes' }, { id: 'representative', label: 'Designated Representative' }, { id: 'vitalRecords', label: 'Vital Records' }, { id: 'healthPractitioner', label: 'Medical Contacts' }, { id: 'statements', label: 'Confirmations' }, ]; const handleInputChange = (e) => { const { name, value, type, checked } = e.target; if (type === 'checkbox') { if (name === 'contagiousDiseases') { setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, contagiousDiseases: checked ? [...prev.contagiousDiseases, value] : prev.contagiousDiseases.filter(item => item !== value) })); } else { setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: checked })); } } else { setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: value })); } }; const handleEligibilityCheck = () => { const years = parseInt(formData.yearsResident); if (years >= 1) { setEligibilityStatus('eligible'); } else if (formData.yearsResident === '0') { setEligibilityStatus('ineligible'); } }; const handleSubmit = async (e) => { e.preventDefault(); setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, submitted: true })); }; const goToSection = (sectionId) => { setCurrentSection(sectionId); }; const goToNextSection = () => { const currentIndex = sections.findIndex(s => s.id === currentSection); if (currentIndex < sections.length - 1) { setCurrentSection(sections[currentIndex + 1].id); window.scrollTo(0, 0); } }; const goToPreviousSection = () => { const currentIndex = sections.findIndex(s => s.id === currentSection); if (currentIndex > 0) { setCurrentSection(sections[currentIndex - 1].id); window.scrollTo(0, 0); } }; const currentSectionIndex = sections.findIndex(s => s.id === currentSection) + 1; const totalSections = sections.length; if (eligibilityStatus === 'ineligible') { return (

Residency Requirement

CEOLP services are only available to Saguache County residents who have lived here for 90+ consecutive days.

For more information on alternative services, please visit the Informed Final Choices website.

); } if (formData.submitted) { return (

Your registration has been received.

What happens next:

We've sent you an email with instructions for Part 2.

You need to:

  1. Download the notarization document (attached to the email)
  2. Print it
  3. Take it to a notary public
  4. Mail the notarized pages to us

Questions?
Call us at (719) 588-7415 (option 2)
or email ceolp.info@gmail.com

When we receive your notarized documents, we'll send you a confirmation that your registration is complete.

); } return (

Part 1: Your Information

Step {currentSectionIndex} of {totalSections}

{currentSection === 'eligibility' && eligibilityStatus === null && (

Let's start with eligibility

CEOLP services are available only to Saguache County residents who have lived here for 90+ consecutive days.

)} {currentSection === 'contact' && eligibilityStatus === 'eligible' && (

Contact Information

)} {currentSection === 'disposition' && eligibilityStatus === 'eligible' && (

End-of-Life Wishes

In case your primary choice is not possible (e.g., fire ban)

)} {currentSection === 'representative' && eligibilityStatus === 'eligible' && (

Designated Representative

This is the person who will carry out your end-of-life wishes.
